tabs.content:
let AssetAnomalies = 
AssetAnomaliesMVAD
| where timestamp >= ago(2hours) and is_anomaly
| summarize anomaly_count = count(), max_severity = max(severity) by asset;
Assets
| project AssetID, AssetType, Manufacturer, Model, Latitude, Longitude = -Longitude, anomaly_count = 0, max_severity = 0
| join kind=leftanti AssetAnomalies on $left.AssetID == $right.asset
tabs.title: Map_Assets

tabs.content:
VehicleTelemetryRaw
| summarize arg_max(timestamp, lat, lon) by VehicleID
tabs.title: Map_Vehicles

tabs.content:
let AssetAnomalies = 
AssetAnomaliesMVAD
| where timestamp >= ago(2hours) and is_anomaly
| summarize anomaly_count = count(), max_severity = max(severity) by asset;
Assets
| project AssetID, AssetType, Manufacturer, Model, Latitude, Longitude = -Longitude
| join kind=inner  AssetAnomalies on $left.AssetID == $right.asset
| project-away asset
tabs.title: Map_AssetsWithAnomalies

tabs.content: TagMetadata | project Tag = tag, TagName = tag, Level1  = asset, Level2 = metric, Level3 = component, Level4 = component

AssetTelemetry('8K2', datetime(null))



AssetTelemetry('8K2')
| top 23300 by timestamp asc
| summarize (max(timestamp))

VehicleTelemetryRaw
| take 100
